title: Impeccable — de-slop a UI
description: Detect and remove the tells that make an interface read as AI-generated — gradient text, Inter everywhere, side-tab borders, nested cards, dark-mode glows, bounce easing, low-contrast text, placeholder images, and SaaS buzzword copy. Wraps Paul Bakaus's `impeccable detect`, using the same deterministic scanner to find the slop and to verify the fix.

cta.label: Fork and run
cta.note: Runs on Jetty's managed sandbox. No setup. Free for your first 10 runs.

example_outputs.title: Audit an AI-generated SaaS hero
example_outputs.summary: Scan a textbook AI-slop landing hero — Inter, a purple→cyan gradient headline, a glowing dark theme, side-tab cards, and buzzword copy — and report all 22 anti-patterns (13 slop tells + 9 quality issues, incl. 6 WCAG contrast failures) without changing a thing.

input.label: Synthetic AI-generated SaaS landing hero (Nimbus) — Inter, gradient headline, glowing dark cards, side-tab borders, buzzword copy

outputs.description: Human-readable audit — verdict, per-rule table, and why each tell matters.

example_outputs.title: Polish the same hero to zero
example_outputs.summary: Take the 22-tell hero and rewrite it: a DM Serif Display + Barlow pairing, a deliberate warm-dark palette with an amber accent, side-by-side icons, flat bordered cards, and concrete copy. A re-scan exits clean — 22 → 0, no regressions.

input.label: Same synthetic SaaS hero as saas-hero-audit (22 anti-patterns)

outputs.description: The de-slopped hero — scans clean (detector exit 0).
Per-rule before/after table (22 → 0) and regression check.
Findings on the polished file (0 — an empty array).
Programmatic validation — gate is re-scan exit 0.

example_outputs.title: Polish a pricing section to zero
example_outputs.summary: A second surface, different tells: Roboto, a purple page, side-tab tiers, nested panels, and bounce easing. Polished into a flat, neutral pricing table with a navy accent (seed #1d4e8f) and a featured tier — 10 → 0 in 2 rounds.

input.label: Synthetic AI-generated pricing section (Orbit) — Roboto, purple page, side-tab tiers, nested panels, bounce easing, buzzword copy

outputs.description: The de-slopped pricing section — scans clean (detector exit 0).
Findings on the polished file (0 — an empty array).
Programmatic validation — gate is re-scan exit 0.

inputs.label: Target
inputs.description: The frontend artifact to de-slop. Uploaded files land in /app/assets/. A directory or an http(s):// URL also works (URLs scan in a real browser).

inputs.label: Operation
inputs.description: audit = report only (changes nothing); polish = fix every finding, then re-scan to prove zero.

inputs.label: Provider tells
inputs.description: Also report a specific provider's signature tells (off by default).

inputs.label: Max polish rounds
inputs.description: Max fix→re-scan iterations before stopping (polish only).

inputs.label: Output basename
inputs.description: Label for the run (the primary output is always polished.html).

attribution.author: Paul Bakaus
attribution.notice: impeccable © 2025-2026 Paul Bakaus (Apache-2.0). Builds on Anthropic's frontend-design skill (Apache-2.0, © 2025 Anthropic, PBC). Typography reference incorporates additions from ehmo's typecraft-guide-skill.

lineage.imported_by: hand-authored@jetty (de-slop capability scoped from the full 23-command skill)

metrics._note: Live counters — supplied by the Jetty backend at render time, not authored here.

demo_ideas.title: Audit a live URL (browser mode)
demo_ideas.why: URL targets render in a real browser and catch even more layout/contrast rules. The static file scan already computes WCAG contrast; the browser engine adds render-time layout checks.
demo_ideas.input_suggestion: Any public landing page you suspect is AI-generated.

demo_ideas.title: De-slop a React/Tailwind component
demo_ideas.why: Exercises the regex engine on .jsx/.tsx (not just HTML) — proves the runbook isn't HTML-only.
demo_ideas.input_suggestion: A single Tailwind feature-card component with the rounded-icon-tile + gradient-text pattern.

demo_ideas.title: Surface GPT/Gemini signature tells
demo_ideas.why: Shows the gated --gpt/--gemini rules (hairline-border-plus-wide-shadow, repeating-gradient stripes, image hover transforms) that are off by default.
demo_ideas.input_suggestion: A page generated by a specific model, with provider_tells set to match.

handoff.name: impeccable-deslop
handoff.eval_runs: 3/3 production runs green on jon-runbooks/impeccable-deslop. audit b8bda6fc (22 findings reported, overall_passed), hero polish 2fc20cfd (22 → 0, no regressions), pricing polish 8dce2661 (10 → 0 in 2 rounds). The production `impeccable detect` proved more thorough than a quick local build (it computes WCAG contrast + DOM structure), and every polish run still drove the re-scan to exit 0.
